mustPass: services route exists because this industry needs explicit presentation of delivery and courier offerings
coverage route exists because service geography is central to courier and postal operations
every default route has a matching sectionsPerRoute entry
all route ids and section ids are kebab-case slugs
all paths are Swedish, lowercase, start with '/' and have no trailing slash
recommended dossiers only use allowed dossier ids
copy avoids invented certifications, fake counts or unsupported promises
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: generic local-service structure without explicit coverage or delivery logic
vague service descriptions like 'hög kvalitet' without naming shipment or courier tasks
invented claims about delivery speed, fleet size, response times or national reach
forcing pricing when the business primarily works via quote requests
portfolio-style galleries as primary structure instead of operational service information
